description_long: This is a modern rocking chair featuring a sleek, minimalist design with a gently curved wooden frame and a light-colored, fabric-upholstered seat and backrest. The frame is constructed from a dark, polished wood, forming continuous runners that allow for smooth rocking motion. The seat and backrest are a single, slightly reclined panel, attached securely to the frame, and feature three small decorative buttons on the backrest. The armrests are integrated into the frame, providing ergonomic support and a visually cohesive look. The runners have a lighter accent at the base, possibly for added durability or aesthetic contrast. This chair is designed for comfort and style, suitable for parks, patios, or modern urban interiors.
description: A modern rocking chair with a curved wooden frame, integrated armrests, and a light fabric-upholstered seat and backrest.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, slightly reclined seat and backrest with three buttons and the curved wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the continuous curved runners, integrated armrests, and the reclined seat profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the seat and the full width of the wooden frame and runners.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizes the smooth curve of the runners and the seamless connection between seat and frame.
